title: Transport Layer
description: Provides reliable or unreliable delivery, flow control, and error recovery.
fullExplanation: The Transport Layer provides end-to-end communication services. TCP provides reliable, ordered, error-checked delivery with flow control and congestion control. UDP provides fast, connectionless delivery without guarantees. This layer uses port numbers (0-65535) to identify applications. Well-known ports: 0-1023, Registered: 1024-49151, Dynamic: 49152-65535.
keyFacts: TCP uses sliding window for efficiency
